ValidationRule.description: MIS-5369 MIS - 2199 - Added to exclude the VR when the related Opp is Closed Lost. So the Request will be cancelled.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
NOT(ISNEW())&& NOW() > (CreatedDate + (1/1440))&& NOT(ISPICKVAL(Opportunity__r.StageName,'Closed Lost'))&&
((RecordType.DeveloperName = "Solution_Engineering"&& $User.Id <> Requester__r.Id) ||
(RecordType.DeveloperName = "Solution_Implementation" && $User.Id = Requester__r.Id && NOT(ISPICKVAL(Cancellation_Reason_PickList__c, 'Closed Lost Opportunity')) ) ||
(RecordType.DeveloperName = "Technical_Solutions" && $User.Id = Requester__r.Id)) &&
$Profile.Name <> "SW CSM Internal" && $Profile.Name <> "SW Consultants" && $Profile.Name <> "System Administrator" && $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps" && $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps Extended" && $Profile.Name <> "SW Client Services" && $Profile.Name <> "SW Sales Internal" &&
NOT(CONTAINS($UserRole.DeveloperName, "Consultants"))&& NOT(CONTAINS($UserRole.DeveloperName, 'Client_Services'))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You don't have permission to edit this record. Please contact SalesOps for further assistance.
